verdict: INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_PENDING — no outcome or no treatment variable in spec

falsification_rule_text: Not supported if the listed channels (housing, productivity, sectoral composition, labour supply, measurement) jointly explain less than 60% of the UK-to-comparator-trend wage-gap. A large unexplained residual would indicate a genuine rent-extraction / capture story inconsistent with the framework's institutional-failure diagnostic.
